Class SchemaRecoder2KeY

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Recoder2KeY
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.SchemaRecoder2KeY
All Implemented Interfaces:
JavaReader, SchemaJavaReader
public class SchemaRecoder2KeY extends Recoder2KeY implements SchemaJavaReader

  • Method Details

    • makeConverter

      protected Recoder2KeYConverter makeConverter(Services services, NamespaceSet nss)
      Description copied from class: Recoder2KeY
      create the ast converter. This is overwritten in SchemaRecoder2KeY to use schema-aware converters.
      Overrides:
      makeConverter in class Recoder2KeY
      Parameters:
      services -
      nss - the namespaces provided to the constructor
      Returns:
      a newley created converter

    • getKeYClassConstructorCache

      protected HashMap<?,?> getKeYClassConstructorCache()
      returns the hashmap of a concrete RecodeR class to the constructor of its corresponding KeY class. Speeds up reflection. Attention must be overwritten by subclasses!

    • getMethodCache

      protected HashMap<?,?> getMethodCache()

    • setSVNamespace

      public void setSVNamespace(Namespace<SchemaVariable> svns)
      Specified by:
      setSVNamespace in interface SchemaJavaReader

    • createEmptyContext

      public de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Context createEmptyContext()
      creates an empty RECODER compilation unit
      Overrides:
      createEmptyContext in class Recoder2KeY
      Returns:
      the recoder.java.CompilationUnit

    • embedClass

      protected CompilationUnit embedClass(ClassDeclaration classDecl, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Context context)
      wraps a RECODER ClassDeclaration in a compilation unit
      Parameters:
      classDecl - the recoder.java.ClassDeclaration to wrap
      context - the Context containing the recoder.java.CompilationUnit where the class is wrapped
      Returns:
      the enclosing recoder.java.CompilationUnit

    • recoderBlock

      protected StatementBlock recoderBlock(String block, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Context context)
      parses a given JavaBlock using the context to determine the right references and returns a statement block of recoder.
      Parameters:
      block - a String describing a java block
      context - recoder.java.CompilationUnit in which the block has to be interpreted
      Returns:
      the parsed and resolved recoder statement block

    • parseSpecialClasses

      public void parseSpecialClasses()
      there is no need to parse special classes in this case, so this is empty
      Overrides:
      parseSpecialClasses in class Recoder2KeY
      See Also:
      • Recoder2KeY.parseSpecialClasses()
